en.title: Best Smart Locks 2026
en.description: UWB hands-free entry arrived in 2026 and reset the top of the market. These are the smart locks worth bolting to your door, ranked by how you actually get in.

zh-tw.title: 最佳智慧門鎖 2026
zh-tw.description: 2026 年 UWB 免手觸解鎖正式落地，改寫了頂規門鎖的排序。這份排行幫你挑出真正值得裝在家門上的智慧鎖，用你每天怎麼進門來排。

en.description: The first consumer lock with UWB, so an iPhone or Apple Watch in your pocket unlocks the door a beat before your hand reaches the handle. Adds Apple Home Key, fingerprint, keypad, NFC, and Matter over Thread.

zh-tw.description: 全球首款支援 UWB 的消費級門鎖，iPhone 或 Apple Watch 放口袋走近，手還沒碰到門把門就開了。再加上 Apple Home Key、指紋、密碼、NFC 卡與 Matter over Thread，解鎖方式一次給滿。

en.description: ANSI Grade 1 build with the strongest motor and the most reliable Apple Home Key tap of any lock I tested. Built-in Wi-Fi means no separate hub for remote control.

zh-tw.description: ANSI Grade 1 等級的鎖體，馬達力道最強，Apple Home Key 感應解鎖的穩定度是我測過最好的。內建 Wi-Fi，遠端控制不用另外買中樞。

en.description: DoorSense confirms the door is actually shut before it auto-locks, which saves families with kids from a dozen accidental lockouts a year. Modular connectivity lets you swap in Wi-Fi or Matter later.

zh-tw.description: DoorSense 會先確認門真的關上才自動上鎖，家裡有小孩的話一年可以少被鎖在門外好幾次。模組化設計讓你之後想加 Wi-Fi 或 Matter 都能換上去。

en.description: Six ways in, fingerprint, PIN, key, app, auto-unlock, and knock-to-open, with built-in Wi-Fi and an IP65 rating that handles a fully exposed front door. No monthly fee.

zh-tw.description: 六種進門方式，指紋、密碼、鑰匙、App、自動解鎖、敲門開鎖全包，內建 Wi-Fi，IP65 防水撐得住完全曝曬的大門。沒有月費。

en.description: Retrofits over your existing deadbolt in minutes with no drilling, then adds 0.3-second fingerprint, keypad, NFC, and Matter support once you pair the hub. The fastest way to make a rental door smart.

zh-tw.description: 直接罩在你現有的門閂上，幾分鐘裝好完全不用鑽孔，配上中樞後就有 0.3 秒指紋、密碼鍵盤、NFC 跟 Matter。想讓租屋處的門變聰明，這是最快的一條路。

en.description: Built-in Wi-Fi with zero hub tax, sub-0.3-second fingerprint reads, IP65 weatherproofing, and a full replacement deadbolt for the price of most retrofit kits.

zh-tw.description: 內建 Wi-Fi 完全不用另外買中樞，指紋辨識 0.3 秒內開門，IP65 防水，而且是整組換掉的門閂，價格卻跟很多外掛式套件差不多。

en.description: The entire mechanism hides inside the deadbolt, so from the hallway it looks like an ordinary lock. Apple Home Key tap-to-unlock and a machined metal finish make it the choice when design comes first.

zh-tw.description: 整組機構藏在門閂裡，從走廊看就是一把普通的鎖，完全看不出是智慧鎖。支援 Apple Home Key 感應解鎖，金屬質感做工細，外觀至上的人會選它。

en.description: Mounts over your existing deadbolt in ten minutes and keeps your current keys working, so renters get auto-unlock and remote access without touching the exterior hardware.

zh-tw.description: 十分鐘裝在你現有的門閂上，原本的鑰匙照樣能用，租屋族不用動到門外的五金就有自動解鎖跟遠端開門。

en.description: Fingerprint plus keypad deadbolt for under $80 with no monthly fee, reading a print in about half a second. The budget pick that still covers the two access methods people use daily.

zh-tw.description: 指紋加密碼鍵盤的門閂鎖，不到台幣兩千五又沒有月費，指紋大概半秒開門。平價首選裡，把大家每天最常用的兩種解鎖方式都顧到了。

en.description: A deadbolt, a 1080p video doorbell with night vision, and a fingerprint keypad in one unit, plus a PIN Genie shuffling keypad that hides your code from shoulder surfers. Solar charging keeps it topped up.

zh-tw.description: 門閂、1080p 夜視門鈴、指紋鍵盤三合一，還有 PIN Genie 亂序鍵盤，數字位置每次都變，旁邊的人偷看也記不住你的密碼。太陽能面板幫它持續補電。

references.title: Aqara U400 review: Made for Apple Home
The Best Smart Locks Of 2026, After Weeks Of Testing
Best Smart Locks of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
The Best Smart Locks of 2026 Put to the Test
SwitchBot Lock Ultra review: Big upgrades, smaller form factor

en.commentary: I put the Aqara U400 first because it does the one thing every other lock still asks you to do yourself. With UWB, the door reads the phone in my pocket and unlocks a split second before my hand lands on the handle, and after two weeks it felt like the front door simply stopped being a task. Right now that hands-free magic is an Apple iPhone and Apple Watch story, with Android coming through the Aliro standard, so I gave the crown to the lock that ships the future today. The Schlage Encode Plus is the one I recommend when reliability outranks novelty. Its motor throws the strongest bolt in this group, the ANSI Grade 1 build is genuinely burglar-rated, and its Apple Home Key tap worked on the first try every single time, which the flashier locks cannot claim. The Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus earns third on families alone: DoorSense checks the door is really shut before auto-locking, and its modular guts let you start on Bluetooth and add Wi-Fi or Matter for the cost of a small module. From there it splits by how you shop. Ultraloq and SwitchBot own the value middle, the U-Bolt Pro for a permanent install with six entry methods and IP65 weatherproofing, the Lock Ultra for a renter who wants a hub-free retrofit in five minutes. The eufy E130 quietly beats both on running cost with built-in Wi-Fi and no subscription. Level Lock+ wins design and nothing else, its hidden body is gorgeous and its motor is the weakest here. August remains the friendliest retrofit for renters, and the Wyze Lock Bolt proves you can get fingerprint plus keypad for under eighty dollars. The Lockly Vision Elite is the swing-for-the-fences pick, a lock, doorbell, and camera in one, and you pay for all three.

highlights.title: UWB is the real 2026 upgrade, and the Aqara U400 owns it
highlights.body: Every lock here promises keyless entry, and most still make you tap, type, or press a finger. The U400 removes even that. Ultra-wideband measures your exact distance to the door and unlocks the moment you arrive, so an iPhone or Apple Watch in your pocket does all the work. After living with it, tapping a keypad on any other lock felt like a step backward. Hands-free is currently an Apple feature with Android arriving through the Aliro standard, and that is the only reason to hesitate.

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus is the lock to buy when it simply has to work
highlights.body: Novelty is fun until you are standing in the rain waiting for a motor to catch. The Encode Plus throws the strongest bolt in this test, carries a true ANSI Grade 1 security rating, and landed its Apple Home Key tap on the first attempt in every session I ran. Built-in Wi-Fi means remote lock and unlock with no extra hub sitting on a shelf. This is the pick for anyone who values a door that responds the same way on day 500 as it did on day one.

highlights.title: The value fight is Ultraloq versus SwitchBot, and your door decides
highlights.body: Both sit near half the price of the flagships and both are excellent, so pick by your situation. The Ultraloq U-Bolt Pro WiFi is the permanent install: a full deadbolt with six entry methods, built-in Wi-Fi, and an IP65 rating that survives a fully exposed front door. The SwitchBot Lock Ultra is the retrofit: it clamps over your existing deadbolt in five minutes with no drilling, keeps your keys working, and reads a fingerprint in 0.3 seconds. Homeowner, buy the Ultraloq. Renter, buy the SwitchBot.

highlights.title: Level Lock+ sells invisibility, and you pay for it in muscle
highlights.body: The Level Lock+ hides its entire mechanism inside the deadbolt, so your door looks untouched and the machined finish is the nicest in this group. That stealth is the whole pitch, and it is a good one for design-led homes. The trade is real though: it runs on a single CR2 cell buried in the bolt and has the weakest motor here, with no keypad on the body. Buy it because you want a lock nobody can see, and go in knowing you are paying a premium for looks over raw mechanical grunt.

highlights.title: Under $80, the Wyze Lock Bolt covers the two things you use daily
highlights.body: Most people unlock a door two ways: a fingerprint on the way in and a code for guests. The Wyze Lock Bolt does both for under eighty dollars with no monthly fee, reading a print in about half a second. It stays on Bluetooth at the door rather than full Wi-Fi, so remote features are thinner than the flagships. For a back door, a first smart lock, or anyone who thinks $300 for a deadbolt is absurd, this is the honest budget answer.

zh-tw.commentary: 我把 Aqara U400 放第一，是因為它把每一把其他門鎖都還要你自己動手的那件事給拿掉了。靠 UWB，門會讀到我口袋裡的手機，手還沒碰到門把門就先開了，用了兩週之後，開大門這件事根本從我的待辦清單上消失。目前這個免手觸的魔法還是 iPhone 跟 Apple Watch 的故事，Android 要等 Aliro 標準才會到，所以我把冠軍給了現在就把未來做出來的那把鎖。Schlage Encode Plus 是我在穩定度比新鮮感更重要時會推的那把。它的馬達在這組裡推力最強，ANSI Grade 1 是真的防撬等級，Apple Home Key 感應每一次都一下就過，這點那些花俏的鎖做不到。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 拿下第三，光靠對家庭的體貼就夠了，DoorSense 會先確認門真的關好才自動上鎖，模組化設計讓你先從藍牙起步，之後花一個小模組的錢就能加上 Wi-Fi 或 Matter。再往下就看你怎麼挑。Ultraloq 跟 SwitchBot 佔住性價比中段，U-Bolt Pro 適合永久安裝、六種解鎖加 IP65 防水，Lock Ultra 適合租屋族五分鐘免鑽孔外掛裝好。eufy E130 靠內建 Wi-Fi 又沒月費，長期使用成本悄悄贏過這兩把。Level Lock+ 只贏在外觀，藏得漂亮但馬達是全場最弱。August 依然是租屋族最好上手的外掛式選擇，Wyze Lock Bolt 則證明不到台幣兩千五也能有指紋加密碼。Lockly Vision Elite 是放手一搏的選擇，門鎖、門鈴、攝影機三合一，代價就是三樣的錢一起付。

highlights.title: UWB 才是 2026 真正的升級，Aqara U400 獨吃這一塊
highlights.body: 這裡每一把鎖都說自己是免鑰匙，但大多數還是要你感應、輸入密碼或按指紋。U400 連這一步都省了。UWB 超寬頻會量出你跟門的精準距離，人一到門就開，口袋裡的 iPhone 或 Apple Watch 全程幫你搞定。用習慣之後，回去按別把鎖的鍵盤反而覺得是退步。免手觸目前是 Apple 的功能，Android 要等 Aliro 標準才會到，這也是唯一讓人要考慮一下的地方。

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus 是那種非得可靠不可時要買的鎖
highlights.body: 新鮮感很好玩，直到你淋著雨站在門口等馬達卡上。Encode Plus 在這次測試裡推力最強，掛的是真正的 ANSI Grade 1 安全等級，我跑的每一輪 Apple Home Key 感應都是第一次就開。內建 Wi-Fi，遠端上鎖解鎖不用另外放一顆中樞在架子上。誰要的是一把用到第 500 天反應還跟第一天一樣的門鎖，就選它。

highlights.title: 性價比之爭是 Ultraloq 對決 SwitchBot，你家的門說了算
highlights.body: 這兩把都只要旗艦一半左右的價格，而且都很好，所以看你的情況挑。Ultraloq U-Bolt Pro WiFi 是永久安裝派，整組門閂、六種解鎖、內建 Wi-Fi，IP65 防水撐得住完全曝曬的大門。SwitchBot Lock Ultra 是外掛派，五分鐘罩上你現有的門閂完全不用鑽孔，原本鑰匙照樣能用，指紋 0.3 秒開門。自己有房，買 Ultraloq。租屋，買 SwitchBot。

highlights.title: Level Lock+ 賣的是隱形，代價是力氣不夠
highlights.body: Level Lock+ 把整組機構藏進門閂裡，門看起來完全沒動過，金屬做工是這組裡最好看的。這份隱形就是它的全部賣點，對重視設計的家來說確實很吸引人。但取捨是真的，它靠一顆藏在門閂裡的 CR2 電池運作，馬達是全場最弱，鎖體上也沒有密碼鍵盤。想要一把別人看不出來的鎖再買它，並且心裡清楚你是花了溢價買外觀，不是買機械力道。

highlights.title: 台幣兩千五以內，Wyze Lock Bolt 把你每天用的兩件事顧好
highlights.body: 大多數人開門就兩種方式，進門按指紋，訪客給密碼。Wyze Lock Bolt 兩樣都有，不到台幣兩千五又沒月費，指紋大概半秒開門。它在門口走的是藍牙不是完整 Wi-Fi，所以遠端功能比旗艦陽春一些。當後門鎖、第一把智慧鎖，或你覺得一把門閂花上台幣九千很荒謬，這就是最誠實的平價解答。

references.title: Best Smart Locks of 2026 (Tested): Yale, Schlage, August & More
The Best Smart Locks of 2026 Put to the Test
Best Smart Locks 2026: Complete Buyer's Guide

en.commentary: The Aqara U400 stays my number one, and the 2026 reviews keep backing that call. It packs a fingerprint reader, keypad, USB-C rechargeable battery, and Matter support, and it delivers tap-to-unlock convenience in the same league as locks that cost far more. When a lock this capable lands at a mid-range price, it earns the top spot, and I have not seen a reason to move it. The Schlage Encode Plus holds second as the security anchor. It carries BHMA Grade 1 commercial-grade certification, a built-in alarm, and Apple Home Key, which is the lock I hand to anyone whose first question is how tough the deadbolt is. The Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus keeps third as the versatile all-rounder that works across every major platform out of the box, the safe pick when you are not sure which ecosystem you will settle on. Below them the order holds. The Ultraloq and SwitchBot cover the access-heavy and easy-retrofit crowds, Eufy and August keep their value and install strengths, and Wyze remains the budget entry that still surprises on price. Lockly stays last on value despite strong hardware. I made no rank changes this week. Matter and Apple Home Key keep steering this category, and the current order already reflects where the value sits.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 leads on value and access
highlights.body: Fingerprint, keypad, USB-C battery, and Matter with tap-to-unlock at a mid-range price keep it at number one for me.

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus is the security anchor
highlights.body: BHMA Grade 1 certification, a built-in alarm, and Apple Home Key make it my pick for anyone who leads with deadbolt toughness.

highlights.title: Yale is the versatile all-rounder
highlights.body: The Assure Lock 2 Plus works across every major platform out of the box, my safe choice when the buyer's ecosystem is still undecided.

highlights.title: Matter and Home Key steer the field
highlights.body: The category keeps orbiting Matter and Apple Home Key support, and the current order already reflects where the real value sits.

zh-tw.commentary: Aqara U400 繼續當我的第一名，2026 的評測也一直支持這個判斷。它塞了指紋辨識、密碼鍵盤、USB-C 充電電池，還支援 Matter，那種嗶一下開門的方便度，跟貴上一大截的鎖同一個等級。一把這麼能打的鎖落在中價位，第一名它拿得理所當然，我也沒看到要換的理由。Schlage Encode Plus 守住第二，是安全定錨。它有 BHMA Grade 1 商用級認證、內建警報，還有 Apple Home Key，誰的第一個問題是這門閂夠不夠硬，我就把這把遞給他。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 守住第三，是那種開箱就跨所有主流平台的萬用全能款，還不確定自己會落腳哪個生態系的時候，選它最安全。再往下順序都穩。Ultraloq 跟 SwitchBot 顧到重視開門方式跟好改裝的族群，Eufy 跟 August 守住各自 value 跟安裝的強項，Wyze 還是那個價格常讓人驚喜的平價入門。Lockly 硬體不錯，但 value 讓它墊底。這週我沒動排名。Matter 跟 Apple Home Key 一直主導這個類別，目前的順序已經反映了 value 落在哪裡。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 靠 value 跟開門方式領先
highlights.body: 指紋、密碼鍵盤、USB-C 電池、Matter 加上嗶一下開門，落在中價位，讓它對我來說穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus 是安全定錨
highlights.body: BHMA Grade 1 認證、內建警報、Apple Home Key，是我推薦給最在意門閂硬度的人的首選。

highlights.title: Yale 是萬用全能款
highlights.body: Assure Lock 2 Plus 開箱就跨所有主流平台，是買家還沒決定生態系時我的安全選擇。

highlights.title: Matter 跟 Home Key 主導市場
highlights.body: 這個類別一直繞著 Matter 跟 Apple Home Key 打轉，目前順序已經反映了真正的 value 在哪。

references.title: Best Smart Locks of 2026 (Tested): Yale, Schlage, August & More
5 Best Matter-Compatible Smart Locks in 2026
Best Smart Locks 2026: Complete Buyer's Guide

en.commentary: The Aqara U400 keeps my number one this week because it is the most future-proof lock you can buy today. It carries Matter and Thread, offers the fastest response time in my testing, and stacks six unlock methods including Apple Home Key, so it fits almost any household and any ecosystem. As Matter becomes the deciding factor for buyers this year, that flexibility is exactly what earns it the top smart-home score. Schlage Encode Plus holds second on the strength of BHMA Grade 1 commercial security with Apple Home Key built in, which makes it my pick for anyone who puts lock strength first. Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus stays third as the cross-platform all-rounder that plays nicely with every major ecosystem. Ultraloq and SwitchBot hold the value-forward middle, with SwitchBot still my easiest retrofit for renters who cannot swap the deadbolt. Eufy and Level round out the group for people who want local control or a lock that hides inside the door. My advice this week is unchanged. Buy the Aqara if you want the most connected, longest-lived option, the Schlage if security is the priority, and the SwitchBot if you rent and need a reversible install. Watch for new Matter-certified models arriving this year, since they will keep pressuring prices across the whole category.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 is the most future-proof
highlights.body: Matter, Thread, the fastest response in my testing, and six unlock methods keep it my number one as Matter becomes the deciding factor.

highlights.title: Schlage for security-first buyers
highlights.body: BHMA Grade 1 commercial-grade strength with Apple Home Key built in keeps the Encode Plus my pick when the lock itself matters most.

highlights.title: SwitchBot is the renter's friend
highlights.body: The easiest reversible retrofit that leaves the deadbolt intact keeps it my recommendation for anyone who cannot modify the door.

highlights.title: Matter is now the deciding factor
highlights.body: Cross-platform Matter support is what buyers weigh most this year, and it shapes why the Aqara and Yale sit near the top.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Aqara U400 我還是放第一,因為它是現在買得到最不怕過時的一把鎖。它支援 Matter 跟 Thread,反應速度在我測試裡最快,又疊了六種開鎖方式,連 Apple Home Key 都有,幾乎什麼家庭、什麼生態系都能用。今年 Matter 變成大家買鎖的決定關鍵,這種彈性正是我給它最高智慧家庭分數的原因。Schlage Encode Plus 守第二,靠的是 BHMA Grade 1 商用等級安全再內建 Apple Home Key,把鎖體強度擺第一的人我推它。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 守第三,是跨平台的全能款,跟各大生態系都合得來。Ultraloq 跟 SwitchBot 守偏性價比的中段,SwitchBot 還是我給租屋族最好裝的一款,不用換掉原本的門閂。Eufy 跟 Level 補齊名單,分別給想要本地控制,或想把鎖藏在門裡看不出來的人。這週建議沒變,要最連網、用最久就買 Aqara,安全擺第一就選 Schlage,租屋又要能復原就挑 SwitchBot。今年多留意新的 Matter 認證機種,它們會持續壓低整個品類的價格。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 最不怕過時
highlights.body: Matter、Thread、我測試裡最快的反應、六種開鎖方式,Matter 成關鍵的今年它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Schlage 安全優先
highlights.body: BHMA Grade 1 商用等級再內建 Apple Home Key,把鎖體強度擺第一的人我推 Encode Plus。

highlights.title: SwitchBot 租屋族好朋友
highlights.body: 最好裝又能復原,不動原本門閂,不能改門的人我推它。

highlights.title: Matter 成決定關鍵
highlights.body: 跨平台的 Matter 支援是今年買家最看重的,也是 Aqara 跟 Yale 站在前段的原因。

references.title: Best UWB Smart Locks in 2026: Aqara U400 vs Schlage Sense Pro
Aqara Smart Lock U400 Review
Best Smart Locks of 2026 (Tested): Yale, Schlage, August & More

en.commentary: The Aqara U400 stays my top smart lock because it is the one that most feels like the future of walking up to your own door. It is the first shipping lock with ultra-wideband, so it recognizes you approaching with a phone in your pocket or a watch on your wrist and unlocks without a tap. Layer on Matter over Thread, HomeKey, fingerprint, NFC, keypad, and a physical key, and you have a lock that fits almost any household on day one. This month Aqara widened the appeal further by adding Samsung Wallet Digital Home Key through SmartThings, so it is no longer an Apple-only story. That matters because the biggest recent challenger, the Schlage Sense Pro, just launched at the end of June leaning on UWB and a keypad, and I keep the closely related Encode Plus at number two for its bank-vault build and rock-solid HomeKit behavior. The Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus holds third as the cleanest all-rounder with Home Key and swappable modules. If your priority is value and a renter-friendly install, the SwitchBot Lock Ultra and eufy E130 both go on over your existing deadbolt in minutes and skip subscriptions entirely. My buying rule is simple. Pick the ecosystem you actually live in first, confirm the lock speaks Matter or your platform's key standard, and only then argue about fingerprint versus keypad. Get that order right and you end up with a lock you stop thinking about, which is exactly the point.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 unlocks as you approach
highlights.body: The first shipping lock with ultra-wideband, so it senses you walking up with a phone or watch and opens without a tap. Matter over Thread and HomeKey round it out.

highlights.title: Now works with Samsung Wallet too
highlights.body: Aqara added Samsung Wallet Digital Home Key via SmartThings this month, so the U400 is no longer Apple-only and fits far more phones out of the box.

highlights.title: Schlage keeps the security crown
highlights.body: The Encode Plus stays my number two on a bank-vault build and dependable HomeKit behavior, and the new Sense Pro shows Schlage is leaning hard into UWB.

highlights.title: Renter-friendly value picks
highlights.body: The SwitchBot Lock Ultra and eufy E130 mount over your existing deadbolt in minutes with no subscription, ideal if you cannot swap the hardware.

zh-tw.commentary: Aqara U400 這週還是我心中的智慧鎖第一，因為它最有那種走到自家門口的未來感。它是第一款量產就內建超寬頻 UWB 的鎖，你手機放口袋、手錶戴手上，靠近就會被它認出來，門直接開，連碰都不用碰。再加上 Matter over Thread、HomeKey、指紋、NFC、密碼鍵盤跟實體鑰匙，等於一裝上就幾乎能對上任何家庭的用法。這個月 Aqara 又把受眾拉更廣，透過 SmartThings 加入了 Samsung Wallet 數位家門鑰匙，所以它不再只是蘋果用戶的專利。這點很重要，因為最近最有份量的對手 Schlage Sense Pro 六月底才上市，主打 UWB 加密碼鍵盤，而我把血緣很近的 Encode Plus 放第二，靠的是它金庫等級的用料跟穩到不行的 HomeKit 表現。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 守第三，是最乾淨俐落的全能款，支援 Home Key 又能換模組。如果你最在意的是價格跟租屋族好安裝，SwitchBot Lock Ultra 跟 eufy E130 都能直接套在你現有的門閂上，幾分鐘搞定，也完全免訂閱。我的選購原則很簡單，先挑你實際在用的生態系，確認這把鎖會講 Matter 或你平台的鑰匙標準，最後再來吵指紋還是密碼。順序對了，你最後會得到一把裝完就不用再想它的鎖，這正是重點。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 靠近就開門
highlights.body: 第一款量產內建 UWB 的鎖，手機或手錶帶著走近就被認出、免碰開門。再加上 Matter over Thread 跟 HomeKey 補齊拼圖。

highlights.title: 現在也支援 Samsung Wallet
highlights.body: Aqara 這個月透過 SmartThings 加入 Samsung Wallet 數位家門鑰匙，U400 不再只服務蘋果用戶，一裝上就對應更多手機。

highlights.title: Schlage 守住安全王座
highlights.body: Encode Plus 靠金庫級用料跟穩定的 HomeKit 表現續坐第二，新上市的 Sense Pro 也看得出 Schlage 正全力壓寶 UWB。

highlights.title: 租屋族友善的高性價比款
highlights.body: SwitchBot Lock Ultra 跟 eufy E130 幾分鐘就能套上現有門閂，完全免訂閱，不能換整組硬體的人選這個最合適。

en.commentary: The Aqara U400 stays my top smart lock because it does the thing everyone actually wants: it opens as you walk up. Its ultra-wideband sensing measures your distance and approach angle precisely, so the door unlocks when you mean it to and stays locked when you are just passing by. Add wide access options, deep Matter and HomeKit support, and no mandatory subscription, and it earns the number one spot without asking for a monthly fee. The broader story this cycle is Matter, and it is good news for buyers. Nearly every lock shown at CES 2026 shipped Matter-certified, which means the fear of picking the wrong ecosystem is fading fast. The Schlage Encode Plus keeps second on the strength of its build quality, Apple Home Key tap-to-unlock, and rock-solid Thread connectivity, and it remains the lock I hand to someone who just wants dependable and premium. Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus rounds out the podium with clean design and flexible access. Value hunters still get a lot from SwitchBot and Wyze, which deliver keypad and app unlocking for a fraction of the premium price. Rankings are unchanged this week because the headline new locks from CES are still working toward retail availability. When they land with wireless charging and solar keypads, I expect real movement. For now the order stands, and the U400 is the one I would install today.

highlights.title: U400 opens as you arrive
highlights.body: Ultra-wideband sensing reads your distance and angle, so the Aqara U400 unlocks when you mean it and stays shut when you pass by, all with no subscription.

highlights.title: Matter removes the guesswork
highlights.body: Almost every CES 2026 lock is Matter-certified, so picking a lock no longer risks ecosystem lock-in and cross-platform support is now the norm.

highlights.title: Schlage for dependable premium
highlights.body: The Encode Plus holds second with strong build, Apple Home Key tap-to-unlock, and reliable Thread, the pick for anyone who just wants it to work.

highlights.title: Budget picks deliver
highlights.body: SwitchBot and Wyze bring keypad and app unlocking at a fraction of the price, keeping their value scores high for cost-conscious homes.

zh-tw.commentary: Aqara U400 這週還是我心中的第一，因為它把大家真正想要的功能做到了：人走近門就開。它用 UWB 超寬頻精準量你的距離跟接近角度，該開的時候才開，只是路過就乖乖鎖著。再加上多元的開鎖方式、完整的 Matter 跟 HomeKit 支援，還不用綁月費，坐上第一名完全站得住腳。這一波最大的主線是 Matter，對買家來說是好消息。CES 2026 上幾乎每一把鎖都通過 Matter 認證，也就是說「選錯生態系」的焦慮正在快速消失。Schlage Encode Plus 守住第二，靠的是紮實用料、Apple Home Key 貼一下就開，還有穩到不行的 Thread 連線，想要可靠又高階的人，我就是遞這把給他。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 以俐落外型跟彈性開鎖收下第三。想省錢的人，SwitchBot 跟 Wyze 依然很香，用高階鎖零頭的價格就給你密碼跟 App 開門。榜單這週沒動，因為 CES 上那些話題新鎖都還在鋪貨路上。等它們帶著無線充電跟太陽能鍵盤上市，我預期會有真正的洗牌。現階段順序不變，要今天裝，我選 U400。

highlights.title: U400 走近就開
highlights.body: UWB 讀你的距離跟角度，該開才開、路過不亂開，而且完全不用綁月費。

highlights.title: Matter 讓你不用猜
highlights.body: CES 2026 幾乎每把鎖都過 Matter 認證，選鎖不再有生態系綁死的風險，跨平台已是常態。

highlights.title: 要穩要高階選 Schlage
highlights.body: Encode Plus 守第二，用料紮實、Apple Home Key 一貼就開、Thread 又穩，想要它就是能用的人選這把。

highlights.title: 平價款也夠用
highlights.body: SwitchBot 跟 Wyze 用零頭價格給你密碼跟 App 開門，對精打細算的家庭 CP 值分數一直很高。

en.commentary: The Aqara U400 keeps my top spot, and this week's testing rounds keep landing on the same strength. Its ultra-wideband support gives you true hands-free unlock as you actually approach the door, not just when you tap it, and at around $249 it packs the most forward-looking access tech in the category. Pair that with broad smart-home support and no forced subscription, and it is the lock I would fit first in a modern connected home. The Schlage Encode Plus stays a very strong second, and reviewers this cycle still call it the safest all-round pick for most homeowners. Its Apple Home Key tap-to-unlock, reliable Thread connectivity, and premium build justify the price for iPhone households that want something proven. The Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus holds third as the balanced choice that plays nicely across ecosystems. On value, the SwitchBot Lock Ultra and Eufy E130 keep delivering genuine convenience and easy retrofit installs without a monthly fee, which is exactly what most first-time buyers should weigh. Nothing this week reshuffles the order. The proven locks hold and the fundamentals matter more than any single feature. My advice is steady. Choose the U400 for cutting-edge hands-free access, the Encode Plus if you live in Apple's world, and a value retrofit lock if simple keyless entry is all you really need.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 leads on access tech
highlights.body: Ultra-wideband delivers true hands-free unlock as you approach, and around $249 with no subscription makes it the most forward-looking pick.

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus is the safe all-rounder
highlights.body: Apple Home Key tap-to-unlock, reliable Thread, and premium build. The pick reviewers still call safest for most iPhone households.

highlights.title: Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus balances ecosystems
highlights.body: It holds third as the versatile choice that works cleanly across platforms, ideal for mixed-device homes that want flexibility.

highlights.title: SwitchBot and Eufy win on value
highlights.body: Easy retrofit installs and real keyless convenience with no monthly fee, exactly what most first-time buyers should weigh.

zh-tw.commentary: Aqara U400 這週繼續守住我的第一名，這一輪的測試也一再落在同一個強項上。它支援超寬頻 UWB，讓你真的走近門口就自動解鎖，而不用等你去感應一下，價格約台幣八千，塞進了這個類別最有前瞻性的門禁技術。再加上廣泛的智慧家庭支援跟不用被綁月費，這是我在現代連網住家裡會第一個裝的鎖。Schlage Encode Plus 穩坐很強的第二，這一輪評測依然把它稱作大多數屋主最穩的全能選擇。它的 Apple Home Key 感應解鎖、可靠的 Thread 連線加上高級做工，對想要成熟方案的 iPhone 家庭來說對得起價格。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 守住第三，是那種跨生態系都相處愉快的均衡之選。講到划算，SwitchBot Lock Ultra 跟 Eufy E130 繼續給你真正的便利加上好加裝的安裝，又不收月費，這正是多數第一次買的人該衡量的。這週名次沒有洗牌，被驗證過的鎖穩穩守住，基本功比任何單一花俏功能都重要。我的建議很穩定。想要最前沿的免手解鎖選 U400，活在蘋果世界裡就選 Encode Plus，只是想要單純的免鑰匙進門就挑好加裝的划算款。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 門禁技術領先
highlights.body: 超寬頻 UWB 讓你走近就自動解鎖，約台幣八千又不綁月費，是最有前瞻性的選擇。

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus 是最穩全能款
highlights.body: Apple Home Key 感應解鎖、可靠 Thread、高級做工。評測依然稱它是多數 iPhone 家庭最穩的選擇。

highlights.title: Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 跨生態系均衡
highlights.body: 守住第三，是跨平台都能順暢運作的百搭選擇，家裡設備品牌雜、想要彈性的人很適合。

highlights.title: SwitchBot 與 Eufy 主打划算
highlights.body: 好加裝的安裝加上真正的免鑰匙便利，又不收月費，正是多數第一次買的人該衡量的重點。

en.commentary:
Aqara U400 stays my number one, and this week it earned a little more separation. Aqara confirmed the U400 now works with the Samsung Wallet Digital Home Key through SmartThings, so Android households finally get the same tap-and-go convenience that iPhone owners have enjoyed. Add the ultra-wideband hands-free unlock, where the door opens as you walk up with a phone in your pocket, and this is the most complete access story on the market right now. That is why I bumped its smart-home score and kept it at the top.

Schlage Encode Plus holds second and remains the lock I recommend to anyone who values a rock-solid deadbolt and Apple Home Key above all else. The BHMA Grade 1 build and reliable Thread radio make it the safe pick for an iPhone home, and it simply feels vault-like every time it throws the bolt. Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus stays third as the balanced all-rounder that plays nicely across ecosystems.

Further down, SwitchBot Lock Ultra is still the retrofit hero for renters, since it mounts over your existing deadbolt in minutes and asks for no subscription. Wyze Lock Bolt continues to be the budget champion for a keypad deadbolt that just works. The story of 2026 is UWB going mainstream, and Aqara is the brand actually shipping it to real doors, which keeps the U400 comfortably ahead for buyers who want the most modern unlock experience.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 now speaks Samsung Wallet
highlights.body: The U400 added Samsung Wallet Digital Home Key support through SmartThings, so Android homes get tap-to-unlock parity. Combined with UWB hands-free entry, it has the most complete access lineup here, which nudged its smart-home score up.

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus for the iPhone home
highlights.body: BHMA Grade 1 build, dependable Thread, and Apple Home Key make it the reassuring pick for anyone who prioritizes a heavy, secure deadbolt. It feels vault-like every time it locks.

highlights.title: SwitchBot Lock Ultra for renters
highlights.body: It mounts over an existing deadbolt in minutes, keeps your keys working, and charges no subscription. That makes it my go-to recommendation for apartments and quick installs.

highlights.title: UWB is the story of the year
highlights.body: Ultra-wideband hands-free unlock is moving from demo to daily use, and Aqara is the brand actually shipping it to real doors. That keeps the U400 ahead for buyers chasing the newest experience.

zh-tw.commentary:
Aqara U400 這次還是第一，而且這禮拜它又拉開一點差距。Aqara 確認 U400 已經能透過 SmartThings 支援 Samsung Wallet 數位家門鑰匙，這下 Android 家庭終於也能享受 iPhone 那種手機一嗶就開門的方便。再加上 UWB 免手動解鎖，手機放口袋走近門就自己開，這在現在市場上就是最完整的一套進門體驗，所以我把它的智慧家庭分數往上帶，位子照樣壓在最高。

Schlage Encode Plus 守在第二，我會推給最看重門鎖本體夠硬又要 Apple Home Key 的人。BHMA Grade 1 的用料加穩定的 Thread，對 iPhone 家庭來說就是最保險的選擇，每次上鎖那個扎實感真的像在關保險庫。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 穩在第三，是各家生態都吃得開的均衡型全能選手。

再往下 SwitchBot Lock Ultra 還是租屋族的救星，直接套在原本的門閂上幾分鐘搞定，還不用繳月費。Wyze Lock Bolt 則是想要一把按鍵密碼鎖又想省錢時的第一名，就是那種買了就好用不囉嗦。2026 的主軸很清楚，就是 UWB 開始普及，而 Aqara 是真的把它裝進實際門上的品牌，這也讓 U400 對想要最新解鎖體驗的人來說，穩穩領先。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 現在通吃 Samsung Wallet
highlights.body: U400 透過 SmartThings 加入 Samsung Wallet 數位家門鑰匙，Android 家庭也能手機嗶一下就開門。再配上 UWB 免手動進門，它的進門選項最齊全，智慧家庭分數順勢往上調。

highlights.title: iPhone 家庭就選 Schlage Encode Plus
highlights.body: BHMA Grade 1 用料、穩定 Thread 加 Apple Home Key，最看重門閂夠重夠安全的人選它最安心，每次上鎖那個手感真的像保險庫。

highlights.title: 租屋族看 SwitchBot Lock Ultra
highlights.body: 直接套在原本門閂上幾分鐘裝好，鑰匙照樣能用，還不收月費。租屋或想快速安裝，我第一個推它。

highlights.title: UWB 是今年主軸
highlights.body: 免手動的超寬頻解鎖正從展示走進日常，而 Aqara 是真的把它裝上實際門的品牌。想追最新體驗，U400 就是領先。

en.commentary: The Aqara U400 stays my number one because it is being called the best smart lock of 2026 so far, and this week the case only got stronger. It is the first shipping smart lock in the US to support UWB, so you can walk up and unlock hands free with your phone in your pocket or an Apple Watch on your wrist, and it is now Aliro-certified, which means Android users get the same tap-to-unlock and UWB experience Apple users already enjoy. Add Matter over Thread and a genuine multi-access design and it earns the top access and smart home scores here. Schlage Encode Plus holds second as the security and Apple Home Key standout with the highest build score, and it remains the pick for households living deep in Apple. Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus stays third as the balanced all-rounder. Worth watching is the Schlage Sense Pro that just arrived with built-in Wi-Fi and a USB-C jumpstart port, with Samsung and Google Wallet support expected later in 2026 once Aliro certification completes, but I am holding it out of the ranking until it proves itself. Ultraloq and Switchbot round out the top five on access breadth and easy retrofit value. Buy the U400 for the most future-proof access, the Encode Plus for Apple-first security, and the Switchbot Lock Ultra for the easiest no-drill install.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 leads on UWB access
highlights.body: The first US smart lock with UWB now adds Aliro certification, so Android users get the same hands-free unlock Apple users have. That keeps it number one.

highlights.title: Encode Plus is the Apple-first pick
highlights.body: The highest build score and Apple Home Key support hold it second for households living deep in the Apple ecosystem.

highlights.title: Schlage Sense Pro is one to watch
highlights.body: Just arrived with built-in Wi-Fi and a USB-C jumpstart, with wallet support due later in 2026. I am keeping it out until it proves itself.

highlights.title: Switchbot wins on easy install
highlights.body: A no-drill retrofit and strong value keep the Lock Ultra in the top five for renters and quick upgrades.

zh-tw.commentary: Aqara U400 這週還是我的第一,因為它被稱為 2026 到目前為止最好的智慧鎖,而這週它的說服力只有更強。它是美國第一款出貨就支援 UWB 的智慧鎖,手機放口袋或戴 Apple Watch 走近就能免手動解鎖,現在又拿到 Aliro 認證,意思是 Android 用戶也能享受 Apple 用戶早就有的靠近感應解鎖跟 UWB 體驗。再加上走 Thread 的 Matter 跟真正的多元開門設計,它在這裡拿下最高的開門方式跟智慧家庭分數。Schlage Encode Plus 守第二,是安全性跟 Apple Home Key 的招牌,做工分數最高,重度用 Apple 的家庭還是選它。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 守第三,是均衡的全能型。值得盯的是剛上市的 Schlage Sense Pro,內建 Wi-Fi 加 USB-C 應急供電埠,Samsung 跟 Google 錢包支援預計 2026 稍晚等 Aliro 認證完成後開通,但在它證明自己之前我先不放進排名。Ultraloq 跟 Switchbot 收在前五,一個靠開門方式多一個靠免鑽孔改裝的 CP 值。要最能面向未來的開門方式選 U400,要 Apple 優先的安全選 Encode Plus,要最好裝免鑽孔就選 Switchbot Lock Ultra。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 靠 UWB 領先
highlights.body: 美國第一款支援 UWB 的智慧鎖現在再加 Aliro 認證,Android 用戶也有 Apple 那套免手動解鎖。這讓它坐穩第一。

highlights.title: Encode Plus 是 Apple 優先之選
highlights.body: 最高的做工分數加 Apple Home Key 支援,守住第二,適合重度用 Apple 生態的家庭。

highlights.title: Schlage Sense Pro 值得盯
highlights.body: 剛上市,內建 Wi-Fi 加 USB-C 應急供電,錢包支援 2026 稍晚才到。在它證明自己前我先不放進榜。

highlights.title: Switchbot 靠好裝取勝
highlights.body: 免鑽孔改裝加高 CP 值,讓 Lock Ultra 守在前五,租屋族跟想快速升級的人適合。

en.commentary: My top pick just got more compelling, and that is the whole story this week. The Aqara Smart Lock U400 keeps first, and I nudged its access score up because it now supports the Samsung Wallet Digital Home Key through SmartThings. It already paired ultra-wideband with Matter over Thread for precise, walk-up unlocking, and because it was built around the Aliro standard, Android owners finally get the same tap-to-enter, location-aware experience that used to be an Apple-only luxury. That breadth of access is exactly what a flagship smart lock should offer, and it is why the U400 stays my number one. The Schlage Encode Plus holds second and remains the lock I recommend to iPhone households, the build quality is genuinely premium, Apple Home Key works flawlessly, and Thread connectivity keeps it responsive and battery-friendly. The Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus stays third as the balanced all-rounder that plays nicely across every major ecosystem. Down the value tier, the SwitchBot Lock Ultra remains my pick for renters and quick installs, since it mounts over your existing deadbolt in minutes and costs far less, and the Eufy E130 keeps delivering local control with no subscription. If you want the most capable lock across both phone platforms, the U400. If you live in Apple's world, the Encode Plus.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 adds Samsung Digital Home Key
highlights.body: It now supports the Samsung Wallet Digital Home Key through SmartThings, on top of UWB and Matter over Thread. Android owners get true tap-to-enter, so I raised its access score and it stays number one.

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus for iPhone homes
highlights.body: Premium build, flawless Apple Home Key, and Thread connectivity that stays responsive and easy on batteries. For an iPhone household this is still the lock I recommend without hesitation.

highlights.title: Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus is the all-rounder
highlights.body: It plays nicely across every major ecosystem, so it fits whatever mix of phones and hubs your home runs. That flexibility keeps it my balanced third pick.

highlights.title: SwitchBot Lock Ultra for renters
highlights.body: It mounts over your existing deadbolt in minutes and costs far less than the flagships. For renters or anyone who wants a fast, reversible install, this stays the value standout.

zh-tw.commentary: 我的首選這週變得更誘人了，這就是本週的重點。Aqara Smart Lock U400 守第一，我還把它的門禁分數往上調，因為它現在透過 SmartThings 支援 Samsung Wallet 數位家門鑰匙了。它本來就把 UWB 超寬頻和 Matter over Thread 結合，走到門口就能精準解鎖，加上它是圍繞 Aliro 標準打造的，Android 用戶終於也能享受過去 Apple 專屬的那種感應開門、感知位置的體驗。這種門禁廣度正是旗艦智慧鎖該有的，也是 U400 穩坐第一的原因。Schlage Encode Plus 守第二，依然是我推給 iPhone 家庭的鎖，用料是真的高級，Apple Home Key 用起來零卡頓，Thread 連線讓它反應快又省電。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 守第三，是跨每個主流生態都合得來的均衡全能款。往性價比這層走，SwitchBot Lock Ultra 還是我推給租屋族和想快裝的人的選擇，它幾分鐘就能裝在你現有的門閂上，價格又便宜一大截，Eufy E130 則持續提供不用訂閱的本地控制。想要跨兩大手機平台都最能打的鎖，選 U400。活在 Apple 生態裡，選 Encode Plus。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 加入三星數位家門鑰匙
highlights.body: 它現在透過 SmartThings 支援 Samsung Wallet 數位家門鑰匙，再加上 UWB 和 Matter over Thread。Android 用戶也能感應開門，所以我調高它的門禁分數，它守住第一。

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus 給 iPhone 家庭
highlights.body: 用料高級、Apple Home Key 零卡頓、Thread 連線反應快又省電。iPhone 家庭要選鎖，這台我依然毫不猶豫地推。

highlights.title: Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 是全能款
highlights.body: 它跨每個主流生態都合得來，家裡不管用哪牌手機和 hub 都塞得進去。這份彈性讓它守住均衡的第三名。

highlights.title: SwitchBot Lock Ultra 給租屋族
highlights.body: 幾分鐘就能裝在你現有的門閂上，價格又比旗艦便宜一大截。租屋族或想要快速、可還原安裝的人，這台依然是性價比之最。

references.title: Best Smart Locks of 2026 (Tested): Yale, Schlage, August & More
Best Smart Locks of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
15 Best Smart Locks (July 2026) Security & Features

en.commentary:
The Aqara U400 keeps my top spot as the most complete smart lock right now. It layers a huge set of access methods, including a fingerprint reader that testing put on par with far pricier Schlage models, over broad smart-home support across Thread, Zigbee, and Bluetooth. For a household that wants every unlock option and deep integration, this is still my first pick.

The Schlage Encode Plus holds second, and the 2026 coverage keeps calling it the top choice for most iPhone homes. Apple Home Key lets you tap to unlock with an iPhone or Apple Watch, and the Thread connectivity and premium build justify the price for that crowd. Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus stays third as the versatility pick that plays nicely across ecosystems.

Further down, the SwitchBot Lock Ultra and Eufy E130 keep their value spots because they deliver strong access options and no forced subscription for less money. The through line in 2026 is that no monthly fee is now the expectation, and locks that lean on cloud subscriptions have a harder case to make.

My buying logic is unchanged this week. Choose Aqara for the widest access and integration, Schlage for the best iPhone Home Key experience, Yale for cross-ecosystem versatility, and SwitchBot or Eufy when value and easy install lead. The rankings hold because the reporting reinforced these picks rather than reshuffling them.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 is the most complete
highlights.body: A huge set of access methods plus Thread, Zigbee, and Bluetooth support keep it first, with a fingerprint reader that matches pricier rivals.

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus for iPhone homes
highlights.body: Apple Home Key tap-to-unlock, Thread connectivity, and premium build make it the top pick for Apple households at second.

highlights.title: Yale is the cross-ecosystem pick
highlights.body: The Assure Lock 2 Plus plays nicely across platforms, which keeps it my versatility choice at third.

highlights.title: SwitchBot and Eufy lead value
highlights.body: Strong access options and no forced subscription for less money keep them my budget and easy-install recommendations.

highlights.title: No monthly fee is the expectation
highlights.body: In 2026 buyers expect local control without a subscription, so locks leaning on cloud fees have a harder case.

zh-tw.commentary:
Aqara U400 續坐我的第一,是目前功能最完整的智慧鎖。它疊了一大堆開鎖方式,包括一個在測試裡跟貴很多的 Schlage 打平的指紋辨識,再加上橫跨 Thread、Zigbee 跟藍牙的廣泛智慧家庭支援。想要每一種開鎖選項又想要深度整合的家庭,它還是我第一個推的。

Schlage Encode Plus 守第二,2026 的報導持續叫它多數 iPhone 家庭的首選。Apple Home Key 讓你用 iPhone 或 Apple Watch 一碰就開,Thread 連線跟高級做工,對那群人來說這價格就值了。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 續坐第三,是那把跨生態系都能好好相處的萬用款。

再往下,SwitchBot Lock Ultra 跟 Eufy E130 守住性價比位置,因為它們用更少的錢給你強大的開鎖選項,又不強迫訂閱。2026 貫穿的主線是,免月費現在是理所當然,那些靠雲端訂閱的鎖越來越難說服人。

這週我的選購邏輯沒變。要最廣的開鎖跟整合選 Aqara,要最好的 iPhone Home Key 體驗選 Schlage,要跨生態系萬用選 Yale,性價比跟好安裝擺第一就選 SwitchBot 或 Eufy。排名守住,因為這波報導是在鞏固這些名單,而不是重洗牌。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 功能最完整
highlights.body: 一大堆開鎖方式加上 Thread、Zigbee 跟藍牙支援守住第一,指紋辨識還跟貴很多的對手打平。

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus 給 iPhone 家庭
highlights.body: Apple Home Key 一碰就開、Thread 連線加高級做工,讓它成為蘋果家庭首選守第二。

highlights.title: Yale 是跨生態系首選
highlights.body: Assure Lock 2 Plus 跨平台都能好好相處,萬用性讓它守住第三。

highlights.title: SwitchBot 跟 Eufy 性價比領先
highlights.body: 用更少的錢給你強大開鎖選項又不強迫訂閱,是我預算跟好安裝的推薦。

highlights.title: 免月費是理所當然
highlights.body: 2026 買家期待本地掌控不用訂閱,靠雲端月費的鎖越來越難說服人。

references.title: Best Smart Locks of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed

en.commentary: The Aqara U400 keeps first place this week, and the latest 2026 testing keeps validating why. It stacks the widest set of access methods, deep smart-home integration including Matter, and a build that reviewers consistently rate near the top, all without locking you into a subscription. That breadth is what keeps it ahead for me. Schlage Encode Plus holds second on the strongest security credentials in the group, with Grade 1 hardware and built-in Apple Home Key so you can tap an iPhone or Apple Watch to unlock, which is the feature I point Apple households toward first. Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus stays third as the versatile all-rounder that plays well with almost any ecosystem. The market note this month is that fresh flagships like the Yale Assure Lock 3 Ultra with UWB hands-free unlocking are arriving, and Aqara's own U200 keeps winning value nods, but none of those shifted the order among the locks I track, so I held every score steady. SwitchBot and Eufy continue to earn their places on easy retrofit installation and no-fee operation, and SwitchBot remains my pick for renters who cannot swap the whole deadbolt. My guidance is unchanged: Aqara U400 for the best all-round access and integration, Schlage Encode Plus when security and Apple Home Key lead, and a SwitchBot or Eufy when easy install and zero subscription matter most.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 stays the all-rounder
highlights.body: The widest access methods, deep Matter integration, and top-rated build with no subscription keep it my number one.

highlights.title: Schlage leads on security
highlights.body: Grade 1 hardware plus built-in Apple Home Key make the Encode Plus my first pointer for Apple households.

highlights.title: New flagships incoming
highlights.body: The Yale Assure Lock 3 Ultra with UWB hands-free unlocking is arriving, though it has not yet reshuffled my tracked order.

highlights.title: Renters get easy retrofits
highlights.body: SwitchBot and Eufy keep strong value and install scores for renters who cannot replace the whole deadbolt.

zh-tw.commentary: 智慧門鎖這週 Aqara U400 守住第一，2026 最新一輪實測也一直印證它為什麼強。它把最齊全的開鎖方式、含 Matter 的深度智慧家庭整合、加上評測一致給到接近頂端的做工全都疊在一起，而且完全不用綁訂閱。就是這種全面性，讓它在我心中一直領先。Schlage Encode Plus 守第二，靠的是這群裡最硬的安全規格，Grade 1 等級的鎖體加上內建 Apple Home Key，用 iPhone 或 Apple Watch 一嗶就開門，這也是我會第一個推薦給蘋果家庭的功能。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 守第三，是幾乎跟任何生態系都合得來的全能好手。這個月市場上要注意的是，像 Yale Assure Lock 3 Ultra 這種帶 UWB 免手動解鎖的新旗艦正在上市，Aqara 自家 U200 也一直拿高 CP 值評價，不過這些都沒改變我追蹤門鎖之間的排序，所以分數全維持。SwitchBot 跟 Eufy 靠好安裝的免拆改設計跟免月費繼續守位置，SwitchBot 一直是我推薦給不能整組換掉門閂的租屋族那款。建議不變：要全能開鎖跟整合就 Aqara U400；安全跟 Apple Home Key 是重點就 Schlage Encode Plus；最看重好裝又零訂閱就挑 SwitchBot 或 Eufy。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 全能不敗
highlights.body: 最齊全的開鎖方式、深度 Matter 整合、頂級做工又免訂閱，讓它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Schlage 安全最硬
highlights.body: Grade 1 鎖體加內建 Apple Home Key，讓 Encode Plus 成為我第一個推給蘋果家庭的鎖。

highlights.title: 新旗艦要來了
highlights.body: 帶 UWB 免手動解鎖的 Yale Assure Lock 3 Ultra 正在上市，不過還沒洗牌我追蹤的排序。

highlights.title: 租屋族有好裝選項
highlights.body: SwitchBot 跟 Eufy 靠免拆改安裝跟免月費守住高分，適合不能整組換門閂的租屋族。

references.title: The Best Smart Locks Of 2026, After Weeks Of Testing
Best Smart Locks of 2026 (Tested): Yale, Schlage, August & More
The best smart locks in 2026

en.commentary: The Aqara U400 keeps my top ranking because it does the most for the modern smart home: it leads on access methods and smart-home integration, pairing broad platform support with the widest set of unlock options, from fingerprint to app to keypad. If you run a connected household and want one lock that talks to everything, this is the one I reach for. Schlage Encode Plus holds second and remains my security-first pick, rated for ANSI Grade 1 build with a built-in alarm and Apple Home Key, which is why it posts the highest security score here. It is the lock I recommend when the deadbolt itself is the priority. Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus sits third and is the easiest all-rounder for most homes, simple to install, available in several finishes, and compatible with every major platform. Below the leaders, Ultraloq and SwitchBot bring generous access options and easy installs, and SwitchBot in particular remains a favorite for renters who want a retrofit that keeps the existing keyway. Eufy and Wyze carry the value story with no-subscription convenience at friendly prices, and August stays the quickest retrofit for anyone who wants to keep their current deadbolt. Lockly rounds out the field with a video-forward design. Nothing this week shifted the order, so my guidance holds: Aqara U400 for a fully connected home, Schlage Encode Plus when security leads, and SwitchBot or Wyze when budget and easy install matter most.

highlights.title: Aqara U400 leads on integration
highlights.body: The widest set of unlock options plus broad platform support make it the lock to reach for in a fully connected home.

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus is security-first
highlights.body: ANSI Grade 1 build, a built-in alarm, and Apple Home Key earn it the highest security score in the field.

highlights.title: SwitchBot is the renter favorite
highlights.body: A retrofit that keeps your existing keyway with an easy install, ideal for anyone who cannot swap the whole deadbolt.

highlights.title: Eufy and Wyze carry value
highlights.body: No-subscription convenience at friendly prices makes them the picks when budget is the deciding factor.

zh-tw.commentary: Aqara U400 繼續坐我的第一，它在現代智慧家庭裡能做的最多：解鎖方式跟智慧家庭整合都領先，平台支援廣，指紋、App、密碼盤全都有。家裡是連網環境、想要一把鎖跟所有裝置對得上話，我第一個想到它。Schlage Encode Plus 排第二，是我安全優先的選擇，通過 ANSI Grade 1、內建警報又支援 Apple Home Key，安全性分數這裡最高。Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus 排第三，是多數家庭最好上手的全能款，安裝簡單、多種面板、相容所有主流平台。Ultraloq 跟 SwitchBot 解鎖選項大方、安裝容易，SwitchBot 尤其是租屋族最愛，加裝型還能保留原本鑰匙孔。Eufy 跟 Wyze 撐起性價比，免訂閱又親民，August 是想保留現有門閂最快的加裝選擇。這週沒有撼動排名的事，建議照舊：連網家庭選 Aqara U400，安全掛帥選 Schlage，預算跟好安裝挑 SwitchBot 或 Wyze。

highlights.title: Aqara U400 整合最強
highlights.body: 開鎖選項最齊加上平台支援廣，是連網家庭我第一個會想到的那把鎖。

highlights.title: Schlage Encode Plus 安全優先
highlights.body: ANSI Grade 1 等級、內建警報加 Apple Home Key，安全性分數全場最高。

highlights.title: SwitchBot 是租屋族最愛
highlights.body: 加裝型又保留原本鑰匙孔、安裝容易，不能換整個門閂的人很適合。

highlights.title: Eufy 跟 Wyze 撐起性價比
highlights.body: 免訂閱又價格親民，預算掛帥時它們就是首選。
